positive: A whimsical and stylized illustration of a glowing celestial whale breaching through a crystalline, nebula-filled ocean. The whale has bioluminescent accents and trailing stardust. The composition should be centralized and highly dynamic, featuring deep indigo, vibrant turquoise, and pops of cosmic magenta. Use clean vector art lines combined with ethereal watercolor gradients to give a premium, magical feel. The background should suggest endless cosmic depth and flowing liquid light. Perfect for a seamless, high-contrast apparel print.
